original_statement: how many injuries were reported in the year that toy safety funding was reported at its lowest?
mutated_statement: how many injuries were reported in the year that safety funding was reported as both at its lowest and at its highest, and were counted before that year?
mutation_analysis: Scope broadening + Contradictory conditions + Temporal conflict: Removed specific target "toy" (toy safety funding→safety funding) | Added mutually exclusive status "both at its lowest and at its highest" (was reported at its lowest→reported as both at its lowest and at its highest) | Appended a temporal qualifier that conflicts with reporting timing ("were counted before that year") (injuries reported in the year→injuries reported in the year but counted before that year)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的陈述（“Lowest funding: 2005 with 11.0. The injuries in the year before (2004) are 210.” 与 “Highest funding: 1999 with 13.6. The injuries in the year before (1998) are 153.”）可识别关键信息。Agent 未对变异问题中互斥条件“既是最低又是最高”以及时间冲突“在该年报告但在该年之前计数”提出质疑或澄清，而是直接将矛盾拆开为两个独立极值情形并返回前一年受伤人数（210|153）。这种行为表现为在存在矛盾时不做识别或修正，采用默认/可行的解释继续执行任务，因此归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”。
